form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second in a small field at Wyong Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1625m, 3.5 len behind Sir Loyne carrying 55kg at $7. On debut third of 12 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn September 27 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Naughty Sort with 56.5kg at $5.50. Genuine filly who should run her usual honest race.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, second last of 8 at Warwick Farm Super Mdn-Sw on March 11 over 1100m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Castlejohn carrying 56.5kg at $31. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at Canberra Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1300m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Uber In carrying 56.5kg at $19. Facing a tougher assignment so happy to pass.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 6th of 13 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn on March 27 over 1280m, slow going 3 len behind Overzone with 58.5kg at $10. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months made significant ground from the rear of the field 2nd of 13 at Muswellbrook Super Mdn on March 27 over 1280m, slow going nose behind Overzone carrying 56.5kg at $91. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Benalla Mdn-Sw on September 26 over 1406m, 5.5 len behind She Moves Too carrying 57kg at $5. Capable of building on that performance and he looks one of the main chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 7 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1400m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Rach with 56kg at $4.20. The race before that 2nd of 9 at Wyong Super Mdn-Sw on February 26 over 1350m, on a slow track; nose behind Serpico with 55kg at $7. Rock hard fit after three runs back and will be hard to beat.
